title: Vanilla Upscaled by AI
description: This resource pack upscales the vanilla textures of the game 4X using a model trained for digital art. It will have changes in the future
body:
This resource pack upscales the vanilla textures of the game 4X using a model trained for digital art. It may have some changes in the future.

## AI Upscaled textures

All of the textures of this resource pack are upscaled by AI. Only the pack icon was made by me. I used an AI to upscale the default textures of the game to see how it looks and i liked the final result even tho it needs a lot of little adjustments so i decided to publish for everyone to enjoy.

[![Partners](https://i.imgur.com/5z7G7f9.png)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2758)
